title.zh-TW: create_node 驗收情境：僅填寫 title_en

body.zh-TW: 驗收情境之一是測試 `create_node` 函數在只填寫 `title_en` 而不填寫 `title_zh` 的情況下，是否能正常建立節點，且 `title_zh` 預設為空字串。
body.en: One acceptance scenario is to test if the `create_node` function can successfully create a node when only `title_en` is provided and `title_zh` is left empty, with `title_zh` defaulting to an empty string.
